nasb.text: Watch yourself that you make no covenant with the inhabitants of the land into which you are going, or it will become a snare in your midst.

esv.text: Take care, lest you make a covenant with the inhabitants of the land to which you go, lest it become a snare in your midst.

cnv.text: 你要小心，不可與你所去的那地的居民立約，恐怕這事在你中間成為陷阱。

ccb.text: 你要谨慎，到了目的地后，不可与当地的居民立约，免得因此而陷入网罗。
